description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa upholstered in dark brown leather with a deep, rich patina. The seat, backrest, and armrests are all generously padded and feature a grid of deep, square tufting, giving the surface a plush, quilted appearance. The armrests are wide, straight, and set at the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy, enveloping silhouette. The sofa sits on four short, black cylindrical legs that are slightly recessed, making them less visually prominent. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a uniform cushion arrangement. The leather surface has a subtle sheen, enhancing the luxurious and inviting look of the piece.
description: A dark brown, tufted leather sofa with wide, boxy armrests and a sleek, modern silhouette. The surface is quilted and glossy, supported by short, recessed black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep tufting, and the uniform, padded seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, padded backrest and the subtle vertical paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat depth, with visible tufting on the backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions with deep square tufting; all cushions are attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, boxy profile, fully padded with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical black legs, slightly recessed under the corners, with a simple, modern style and no visible ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with deep tufting and attached padding, matching the armrest height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Dark brown leather with a grid of deep, square tufting, creating a quilted, textured surface with a subtle glossy sheen.
